violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. The walk in cooler had products temping between 50 and 52 degrees. The air temp was 52 degrees. The thermostat was set at 50 degrees. Had owner re adjust.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Paper boats and ice cream containers on the bottom shelf by the flat grill were not inverted.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
